summary: Completed testing of Iteration 9 features: HR registration restriction and View/Edit/Delete on endorsements. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register with role=Admin returns 403 error
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with role=HR succeeds
Backend: HR can get their endorsements
Backend: Admin can get all endorsements
Backend: Single endorsement fetch returns all required fields for View dialog
Backend: HR can update their own pending endorsements
Backend: HR cannot update approved endorsements (returns 403)
Backend: Admin can update any endorsement
Backend: HR can delete their own pending endorsements
Backend: HR cannot delete approved endorsements (returns 403)
Backend: Endorsement response has all 17 fields needed for View dialog
Frontend: Registration form shows 'HR User' as fixed role (no Admin option)
Frontend: Registration form has hidden input with value='HR'
Frontend HR: My Endorsements has View (eye) button on all 9 endorsements
Frontend HR: My Endorsements has Edit (pencil) button on 5 Pending endorsements only
Frontend HR: My Endorsements has Delete (trash) button on 5 Pending endorsements only

Frontend HR: View dialog shows all 16 required fields (Policy Number, Employee ID, Member Name, Relationship, Endorsement Type, Status, DOB, Age, Gender, Sum Insured, Endorsement Date, Effective Date, Date of Joining, Date of Leaving, Annual Premium/Life, Pro-rata Premium, Remarks)
Frontend HR: Edit dialog has Member Name, Employee ID, Gender, Endorsement Date, Effective Date, Remarks inputs
Frontend HR: Edit saves successfully and shows 'Endorsement updated' toast
Frontend Admin: All Endorsements has View (eye) button on all 10 endorsements
Frontend Admin: All Endorsements has Edit button on all 10 endorsements
Frontend Admin: All Endorsements has Delete button on all 10 endorsements
Frontend Admin: View dialog shows all 16 required fields
Frontend Admin: Edit dialog has Member Name, Relationship Type, Endorsement Type, Endorsement Date, Effective Date inputs
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_features.py - Created test suite for Iteration 9 features
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested and working. 1) Registration form now shows 'HR User' as fixed text (not dropdown) - backend returns 403 if role=Admin is sent. 2) HR My Endorsements page has View/Edit/Delete buttons - View on all, Edit/Delete only on Pending. 3) Admin All Endorsements page has View/Edit/Delete buttons on all endorsements. 4) View dialog shows 16 fields including DOJ, DOL, annual premium, prorata premium. 5) Edit dialog allows updating member name, employee id, gender, dates, remarks. 6) Edit saves successfully with toast notification.

registration_role_restriction.details: Registration form shows 'HR User' as fixed text. Backend returns 403 for Admin role registration.

hr_my_endorsements_view_edit_delete.details: View button on all endorsements, Edit/Delete only on Pending. View dialog shows all 16 fields. Edit dialog works and saves successfully.

admin_all_endorsements_view_edit_delete.details: View/Edit/Delete buttons on all endorsements. View dialog shows all 16 fields. Edit dialog works correctly.

ui_observations.registration_form: Role field shows 'HR User' as fixed text in gray background, not a dropdown
ui_observations.hr_my_endorsements: 9 total endorsements, 5 Pending (with Edit/Delete), 4 Approved (View only)
ui_observations.admin_all_endorsements: 10 total endorsements, all have View/Edit/Delete buttons
